ddls:
CREATE TABLE "words" (
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word */,
  "word" TEXT /* The word itself */,
  "word_defined" TEXT /* The defined form of the word */,
  "part_of_speech" TEXT /* The part of speech (e.g., noun, verb, adverb) */,
  "date_first_used" TEXT /* The earliest known date of the word's use */,
  "longest_word_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the longest word ID if applicable */,
  "word_definition_history" TEXT /* History of changes to the word's definition */,
  "source_reference" TEXT /* References to the sources where the word's information is derived from */,
  "etymology" TEXT /* The etymology of the word */,
  "example_usage" TEXT /* Example sentences or phrases using the word */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the word's information was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the word entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the word entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "definitions" (
  "definition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each definition */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word the definition belongs to */,
  "definition_number" INTEGER /* Number of the definition (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "definition_text" TEXT /* The text of the definition */,
  "example_usage" TEXT /* Example sentences or phrases using the definition */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the definition was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the definition */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the definition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("definition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_definitions_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_definitions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_definitions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pronunciations" (
  "pronunciation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pronunciation */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word the pronunciation belongs to */,
  "pronunciation_text" TEXT /* Phonetic representation of the pronunciation */,
  "pronunciation_audio" TEXT /* File path to the audio pronunciation */,
  "pronunciation_type" TEXT /* Type of pronunciation (e.g., American English, British English) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the pronunciation was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the pronunciation */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the pronunciation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pronunciation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pronunciations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pronunciations_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pronunciations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "synonyms" (
  "synonym_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synonym relationship */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word */,
  "synonym_word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the synonym word */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the synonym relationship was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the synonym relationship */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the synonym relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("synonym_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_synonyms_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_synonyms_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_synonyms_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_synonyms_synonym_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("synonym_word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "antonyms" (
  "antonym_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each antonym relationship */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word */,
  "antonym_word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the antonym word */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the antonym relationship was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the antonym relationship */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the antonym relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("antonym_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_antonyms_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_antonyms_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_antonyms_antonym_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("antonym_word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_antonyms_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user contribution */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word the contribution is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who contributed */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., definition, example, correction) */,
  "contribution_text" TEXT /* Text of the contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contribution (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the contribution */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contributions_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contributions_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, editor, general user) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the user's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
